---
description: npm package identity, publish boundaries, and release consistency (@techystuff/feature-cards)
globs: package.json

# npm package & release consistency

Canonical package: **`@techystuff/feature-cards`** (npm org **`@techystuff`**).
Playbook: `docs/NPM.md` · release: `docs/RELEASE.md` · commercial: `COMMERCIAL-LICENSING.md`.

## Package identity (never drift)

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| npm name | `@techystuff/feature-cards` |
| npm org | `@techystuff` (publishers must be org members) |
| GitHub repo | `Hum2a/feature-cards` |
| Licence | `AGPL-3.0-only` in `package.json` + tarball legal files |

When renaming scope or package, update **every** import/CDN string, legal template,
`typedoc.json` `name`, bundle banners in `vite.config.ts` / `vite.react.config.ts`,
and `src/watermark.ts` `PROVENANCE.repo` (GitHub URL only — not the npm name).

## What ships on npm vs what does not

**Published** (`package.json` `files` + `prepublishOnly`):

- `dist/feature-cards.js`, `dist/feature-cards.iife.js`, `dist/react.js`, `dist/types/`
- `custom-elements.json`
- `LICENSE`, `NOTICE`, `COPYRIGHT`, `LEGAL.md`, `TRADEMARK.md`, `COMMERCIAL-LICENSING.md`, `README.md`

**Never in the tarball:**

- `dist/demo/`, `demo/`, `tests/`, `worker/`, scripts, CI configs

`npm run build` includes the demo; **`npm run build:lib`** is the publish build.
`prepublishOnly` runs **`npm run pack:verify`** — do not bypass or weaken it.

## `package.json` invariants

- `"type": "module"` · `"sideEffects": false`
- `"publishConfig": { "access": "public" }` (scoped packages require explicit public)
- `exports` map: `.`, `./iife`, `./react` — do not break without semver major + docs
- `files` must include all legal docs shipped to consumers
- Version in `package.json` must match git tag `v*.*.*` before publish

## Release checklist (maintainers)

When bumping version or preparing a release:

1. **`CHANGELOG.md`** — dated section for the new version
2. **`package.json`** `version` — semver aligned with change type (release script syncs doc pins via `scripts/sync-version-pins.mjs`)
3. **CDN / cookbook pins** — updated automatically on release; CI enforces with `npm run version:sync:check`
4. **`npm run sri`** — if IIFE hash changed, update cookbook SRI snippets
5. **`npm run cem:check`** — if public custom-element API changed
6. **`npm run pack:verify`** — tarball clean before publish
7. **Tag** `vX.Y.Z` on the release commit → CI [`publish-npm.yml`](../.github/workflows/publish-npm.yml) or `npm run release:package` locally

Use **`npm run release:patch|minor|major`** — not `npm run release --minor` (npm swallows flags).
Local publish requires npm **2FA**: `node scripts/publish-package.mjs --skip-check --otp=CODE`.

Commands: `npm run npm:preflight` (doctor + pack + publish dry-run when tagged).

## Docs & examples must match npm API

- Install: `npm install @techystuff/feature-cards`
- ESM: `import '@techystuff/feature-cards'`, `createFeatureCards`, `@techystuff/feature-cards/react`
- CDN: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@techystuff/feature-cards@VERSION/dist/feature-cards.iife.js`
- Pin **exact versions** in production examples — avoid stale `@1.2` placeholders
- Demo themes/editor (`demo/`) are **not** part of the npm API — never document them as shipped

## Commercial dual-licensing

- Public npm stays **AGPL-3.0-only**; closed-source buyers get a **signed commercial grant**
- Grant letters reference `@techystuff/feature-cards@x.y.z` — keep templates in `docs/licenses/` in sync
- Do not add license keys, private registries, or DRM without an explicit ADR

## Do not

- Publish without `pack:verify` passing (CI enforces this)
- Put demo build artefacts in `dist/` before pack (`clean` + `build:lib` only)
- Remove legal files from `package.json` `files`
- Change `@techystuff` scope without updating org docs and `npm org ls techystuff` guidance
- Strip copyright banners from `vite.config.ts` Rollup `output.banner`

After editing this rule: `npm run rules:sync` and `npm run rules:sync:check`.
